required_preferences.fact: Avoids running or strenuous activity entirely due to doctor’s orders — instead opts for gentle stretching at home during recovery

supersedes.fact: Runs along the Rhône river regardless of weather — never uses gym treadmills

required_preferences.fact: Records and critically reviews bilingual group project rehearsals with her French classmates, prioritizing collaborative performance feedback over solo exam response practice

supersedes.fact: Records and critically reviews mock oral exam responses daily, using native speaker feedback to improve fluency and comprehension for the advanced test

required_preferences.fact: Temporarily pauses daily texts and voice memos with her boyfriend while he’s visiting, opting for in-person connection instead
Actively volunteers to draft the English portions of the group presentation, relying on project partners for advanced French synthesis and pronunciation support
Only takes handwritten notes in class to reinforce French vocabulary — avoids typing or using laptops
Writes a weekly language progress checklist every Monday — never skips tracking her French improvement

persona: An exchange student living abroad for a semester
